# PQ Private Transfer Protocol

## Project Overview
Implement a post-quantum anonymous transfer protocol on Ethereum using Scaffold-ETH (Hardhat + NextJS).
The protocol uses Ring Regev (RLWE) homomorphic encryption for confidential balances and client-side STARKs for zero-knowledge proofs.
Transfers achieve recipient anonymity via ORAM-inspired dummy recipients (N=4: 1 real + 3 dummies).

Read more about the protocol design and cryptographic primitives in `docs/Protocol_Design.md`.

## Tech Stac... [truncated, 9361 chars total]

All 5 questions resolved across prior loop: (1) mock STARK prover; (2) block transfers with pool<5; (3) deposit() top-up in scope; (4) keccak256(encTotal) nullifier map; (5) overdraft/underflow client-side only with mock-prover caveat. Design was previously approved (revision 4). Implementation reached task-06 (PrivateTransfer.sol) before loop terminated.

PQ Private Transfer design v4 finalized. All 5 Q&A decisions incorporated: (1) mock STARK prover, (2) block transfer pool<5, (3) deposit() top-up, (4) keccak256(encTotal) nullifier map (R12, TransferAlreadyUsed), (5) overdraft/underflow client-side only (section 8a, test scenarios 3+6). Design approved. 5 minor concerns (non-blocking): (1) withdraw CEI missing emit Withdrawn, (2) encBalanceToUpdateSender[4] role not explicit in transfer CEI, (3) execution gas for 5x8KB SSTORE unquantified, (4) deposit() missing from class diagram, (5) section 9 header missing. task-1773226271-c95e: usedTransfers nullifier mapping not implemented (task requirement #5 silently skipped). TransferAlreadyUsed error missing from contract and ABI. Mock verifier does not prevent proof replay — double-spend via repeated transfer() call with same proof is possible.

task-1773226271-c95e: added usedTransfers nullifier mapping + TransferAlreadyUsed error to prevent proof replay/double-spend. Nullifier checked after recipient validation. ABI updated. 40/40 tests pass (was 39).
task-1773226271-c95e: usedTransfers nullifier correct, TransferAlreadyUsed error wired, double-spend test passes. 40/40 tests pass.

All 9 implementation steps complete. 40/40 hardhat tests pass. PrivateTransfer.sol with security features (nullifier, pool check, reentrancy guard), 3 verifier contracts, 3 frontend pages (register/transfer/withdraw), crypto package all done.
